title: Saturn’s Failure Echoes Upward
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Vegapunk, Unknown person #15, York as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like we weren't able to move the Labo- stratum, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That traitor York got in the way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The signal reaches across the globe,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So she'll still be able to connect.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Until the day all of humanity can access our brain,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We haFTA keep it safe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that's better than Handin' her the whole thing on a silver platter, ain't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll probably be at least 500 years. I assume you used a roaming cloud?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You got it! But the whole world will reckon us vegapunks are six feet under...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So it ain't like we can leisurely tour the world now, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I hope, and with no funds or resources, we can't keep inventing either...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll just hafta leave that to our partners!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Clasp

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Nice. I'm not sure. I'm not sure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How do we look?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Absolutely bonkers! Ha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see you always admired my lovely proportions, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shudap, ya knuckle- head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Let's toss york's spare parts out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WEATHERIA, COME IN. ANYONE THERE? THIS HERE'S VEGAPUNK!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: VegaPounkz! But I thought you were deeeadz!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: KAMABAKA QUEENDOM

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Oh my, how grizzly! What's gonna happen?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are we going to die? I don't wanna die!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No water's gonna kill me! I can swim!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: to put it bluntly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: None of us knew these details.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Void Century covered up a massive war...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: and that culmination in ancient weapons tech...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Plunging the world 200 meters deeper into the ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not only that, but the one who claims the one piece...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...will not only be crowned pirate King...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll likely get to wield that devastating power for themselves!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We can't let that happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: The world will sink...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This explains why the first celestial dragons chose to live on the red line; it's the highest point on the planet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's also tequila VULF, VODKA VULF, rum VULF, and Bourbon VULF!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this why they've spent the last 700 years forCINGK slaves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...to build all those gigantic structures?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: All the pieces are falling into place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You took the words right outta my mouth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Mine Tooooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Vegapunk... among those who heed your warning...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Many will act out of self-interest, not peace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must hurry and achieve victory for our cause...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...before the people of the world kill each other to secure habitable land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: An era of chaos dawns...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 47 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
